+-------------------------------------+   +------------------------------------+
|  Authentication                     |   |  Processing                        |
|                                     |   |                                    |
| +---------+        +------------+   |   |  +---------+        +-----------+  |
| |  Login  +------->|  Validate  +---o---o->|  Parse  +------->|  Execute  |  |
| +---------+        +------------+   |   |  +---------+        +-----------+  |
|                                     |   |                                    |
|                                     |   |                                    |
+-------------------------------------+   +------------------------------------+
